headline: Centene (CNC) Appoints Lauren M. Tyler To Board With JPMorgan Leadership Experience
summary: Centene (NYSE:CNC) has appointed Lauren M. Tyler to its Board of Directors. Tyler brings leadership experience from major financial institutions, including roles in investment banking, private equity, corporate audit, investor relations, and human capital strategy. Her background includes senior positions at JPMorgan Chase & Co. and board service across several organizations. For investors tracking Centene, the board appointment comes at a time when the stock trades around $65.73, with the...
